Safe_Walkway_Violation.description: Person detected outside green-marked designated safe walkway boundaries.
Safe_Walkway_Violation.observable_indicator: Person position beyond green walkway boundary.
Safe_Walkway_Violation.detection_approach: YOLO person detection plus green floor boundary overlap.
Safe_Walkway_Violation.tier_justification: Walkway breaches represent high-frequency pedestrian hazards in machinery/traffic zones.

escalation_rules.rationale: Pedestrian is within one meter of active machinery.
Walkway breach occurs during active forklift operations.

Unauthorized_Intervention.description: Personnel performing maintenance or intervention on machinery without authorization vest.
Unauthorized_Intervention.observable_indicator: Torso area lacking green safety vest; hands in proximity to operating equipment.
Unauthorized_Intervention.detection_approach: YOLO person detection, vest color classification, and machine proximity tracking.
Unauthorized_Intervention.tier_justification: Direct physical contact or proximity to moving machinery elements without clearance.

escalation_rules.rationale: Multiple unauthorized workers compound the machinery safety hazard.

Opened_Panel_Cover.description: Electrical panel cover left open exposing dangerous internal circuitry.
Opened_Panel_Cover.observable_indicator: Electrical or machine cabinet panel door in open position.
Opened_Panel_Cover.detection_approach: Template matching or edge density contrast analysis of panel door area.
Opened_Panel_Cover.tier_justification: Exposed high-voltage circuits pose shock and arc flash hazards.

escalation_rules.rationale: High-voltage cabinet left open for over five minutes.
Unprotected person within touching distance of open electrical panel.

Carrying_Overload_with_Forklift.description: Forklift vehicle carrying more than two stacked blocks or pallets.
Carrying_Overload_with_Forklift.observable_indicator: Block count on forklift forks is greater than or equal to three.
Carrying_Overload_with_Forklift.detection_approach: YOLO truck/forklift detection and box contour counting on the forks.
Carrying_Overload_with_Forklift.tier_justification: Forklift overloading exceeds capacity, causing instability and tip risks.
